text: Exalted is He who took His Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] by night from al-Masjid al-Ḥarām to al-Masjid al-Aqṣā, whose surroundings We have blessed, to show him of Our signs. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Seeing.
tl: Subhaanal lazeee asraa bi'abdihee lailam minal Masjidil Haraami ilal Masjidil Aqsal lazee baaraknaa haw-lahoo linuriyahoo min aayaatinaa; innahoo Huwas Samee'ul Baseer

text: And We gave Moses the Scripture and made it a guidance for the Children of Israel that you not take other than Me as Disposer of affairs,
tl: Wa-aatainaa Moosal Kitaaba Wa-ja'alnaahu hudal liBaneee Israaa'eel; allaa tat-takhizoo min doonee wakeelaa.

text: O descendants of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah. Indeed, he was a grateful servant.
tl: Zurriyyata man hamalnaa ma'a Nooh innahoo kaana 'abdan shakooraa

text: And We conveyed to the Children of Israel in the Scripture that, \"You will surely cause corruption on the earth twice, and you will surely reach [a degree of] great haughtiness.\"
tl: Wa qadainaaa ilaa Baneee Israaa'eela fil Kitaabi latufsidunna fil ardi marratain; Wa-lata'lunna'uluwwan kabeeraa

text: So when the [time of] promise came for the first of them, We sent against you servants of Ours - those of great military might, and they probed [even] into the homes, and it was a promise fulfilled.
tl: Fa-izaa jaaa'a wa'du oolaahumaa ba'asnaaa 'alykum 'ibaadal lanaaa ulee baasin shadeedin fajaasoo khilaalad diyaar; Wa-kaana wa'dam maf'oolaa

text: Then We gave back to you a return victory over them. And We reinforced you with wealth and sons and made you more numerous in manpower.
tl: Summa radadnaa lakumul karrata 'alaihim Wa-amdad-naakum-bi amwaalinuw Wa-baneen; Wa-ja'alnaakum aksara nafeeraa

text: [And said], \"If you do good, you do good for yourselves; and if you do evil, [you do it] to them [i.e., yourselves].\" Then when the final [i.e., second] promise came, [We sent your enemies] to sadden your faces and to enter the masjid [i.e., the temple in Jerusalem], as they entered it the first time, and to destroy what they had taken over with [total] destruction.
tl: In ahsantum ahsantum li-anfusikum Wa-in asaatum falahaa; fa-izaa jaaa'a wa'dul aakhirati liyasooo'oo wujoo-hakum Wa-liyadkhulul masjida kamaa dakhaloohu awwala marratinw Wa-liyutabbiroo maa a'law tatbeera

text: [Then Allāh said], \"It is expected, [if you repent], that your Lord will have mercy upon you. But if you return [to sin], We will return [to punishment]. And We have made Hell, for the disbelievers, a prison-bed.\"
tl: Asaa rabbukum aien yarhamakum; Wa-in 'uttum 'udnaa; Wa-ja'alnaa jahannama lilkaafireena haseera

text: Indeed, this Qur’ān guides to that which is most suitable and gives good tidings to the believers who do righteous deeds that they will have a great reward
tl: Inna haazal Quraana yahdee lillatee hiya aqwamu Wa-yubashshirul mu'mineenal lazeena ya'maloonas saalihaati anna lahum ajran kabeeraa

text: And that those who do not believe in the Hereafter - We have prepared for them a painful punishment.
tl: Wa-annal lazeena laa yu'minoona bil-aakhirati a'tadnaa lahum 'azaaban aleemaa

text: And man supplicates for evil [when angry] as he supplicates for good, and man is ever hasty.
tl: Wa-yad'ul insaanu bishsharri du'aaa-'ahoo bilkhayr; Wa-kaanal insaanu 'ajoola

text: And We have made the night and day two signs, and We erased the sign of the night and made the sign of the day visible that you may seek bounty from your Lord and may know the number of years and the account [of time]. And everything We have set out in detail.
tl: Wa-ja'alnal laila wannahaara Aayatayni famahawnaaa Aayatal laili Wa-ja'alnaaa Aayatan nahaari mubsiratal litabtaghoo fadlam mir Rabbikum Wa-lita'lamoo 'adadas sineena walhisaab; Wa-kulla shai'in fassalnaahu tafseelaa

text: And [for] every person We have imposed his fate upon his neck, and We will produce for him on the Day of Resurrection a record which he will encounter spread open.
tl: Wa-kulla insaanin alzamnaahu taaa'irahoo fee 'unuqihee Wa-nukhriji lahoo Yawmal Qiyaamati kitaabany yalqaahu manshooraa

text: [It will be said], \"Read your record. Sufficient is yourself against you this Day as accountant.\"
tl: Iqra kitaabaka kafaa bi-nafsikal Yawma 'alaika haseebaa

text: Whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] his soul. And whoever errs only errs against it. And no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. And never would We punish until We sent a messenger.
tl: Manih tadaa fa-innamaa yahtadee linafsihee Wa-man dalla fa-innamaa yadillu 'alaihaa; Wa-laa taziru waaziratunw wizra ukhraa; Wa-maa kunnaa mu'azzibeena hatta nab'asa Rasoola

text: And when We intend to destroy a city, We command its affluent but they defiantly disobey therein; so the word [i.e., deserved decree] comes into effect upon it, and We destroy it with [complete] destruction.
tl: Wa-izaaa aradnaaa an nuhlika qaryatan amarnaa mutrafeehaa fafasaqoo feehaa fahaqqa 'alaihal qawlu fadammarnaahaa tadmeeraa

text: And how many have We destroyed from the generations after Noah. And sufficient is your Lord, concerning the sins of His servants, as Aware and Seeing.
tl: Wa-kam ahlaknaa minal qurooni min ba'di Nooh; Wa-kafaa bi-Rabbika bizunoobi 'ibaadihee Khabeeram Baseeraa

text: Whoever should desire the immediate - We hasten for him from it what We will to whom We intend. Then We have made for him Hell, which he will [enter to] burn, censured and banished.
tl: Man kaana yureedul 'aajilata 'ajjalnaa lahoo feehaa maa nashaaa'u liman nureedu summa ja'alnaa lahoo Jahannama yaslaahaa mazmoomammad hooraa

text: But whoever desires the Hereafter and exerts the effort due to it while he is a believer - it is those whose effort is ever appreciated [by Allāh].
tl: Wa-man araadal Aakhirata Wa-sa'aa lahaa sa'yahaa Wa-huwa mu'minun fa-ulaaa'ika kaana sa'yuhum mashkooraa

text: To each [category] We extend - to these and to those - from the gift of your Lord. And never has the gift of your Lord been restricted.
tl: Kullan numiddu haaa-'ulaaa'i Wa-haaa'ulaaa'i min 'ataaa'i rabbik; Wa-maa kaana 'ataaa'u rabbika mahzooraa

text: Look how We have favored [in provision] some of them over others. But the Hereafter is greater in degrees [of difference] and greater in distinction.
tl: Unzur kaifa faddalnaa ba'dahum 'alaa ba'd; Wa-lal-Aakhiratu akbaru darajaatinw Wa-akbaru tafdeelaa

text: Do not make [as equal] with Allāh another deity and [thereby] become censured and forsaken.
tl: Laa taj'al ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara fataq'uda mazoomam makhzoolaa

text: And your Lord has decreed that you worship not except Him, and to parents, good treatment. Whether one or both of them reach old age [while] with you, say not to them [so much as], \"uff,\" and do not repel them but speak to them a noble word.
tl: Wa qadaa Rabbuka allaa ta'budooo illaaa iyyaahu Wa-bilwaalidaini ihsaanaa; immaa yablughanna 'indakal kibara ahaduhumaaa aw kilaahumaa falaa taqul lahumaaa uffinw Wa-laa tanharhumaa Wa-qullahumaa qawlan kareemaa

text: And lower to them the wing of humility out of mercy and say, \"My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up [when I was] small.\"
tl: Wakhfid lahumaa janaahaz zulli minar rahmati Wa-qur Rabbir hamhumaa kamaa rabbayaanee sagheera

text: Your Lord is most knowing of what is within yourselves. If you should be righteous [in intention] - then indeed He is ever, to the often returning [to Him], Forgiving.
tl: Rabbukum a'lamu bimaa fee nufoosikum; in takoonoo saaliheena fa-innahoo kaana lil-awwaabeena Ghafoooraa

text: And give the relative his right, and [also] the poor and the traveler, and do not spend wastefully.
tl: Wa-aati zal qurbaa haqqahoo walmiskeena wabnas sabeeli Wa-laa tubazzir tabzeeraa

text: Indeed, the wasteful are brothers of the devils, and ever has Satan been to his Lord ungrateful.
tl: Innal mubazzireena kaanoo ikhwaanash shayaateeni Wa-kaanash shaytaanu li-Rabbihee kafooraa

text: And if you [must] turn away from them [i.e., the needy] awaiting mercy from your Lord which you expect, then speak to them a gentle word.
tl: Wa-immaa tu'ridanna 'anhum ubtighaaa'a rahmatim mir rabbika tarjoohaa faqul lahum qawlam maisooraa

text: And do not make your hand [as] chained to your neck or extend it completely and [thereby] become blamed and insolvent.
tl: Wa-laa taj'al yadaka maghloolatan ilaa 'unuqika Wa-laa tabsut-haa kullal basti fataq'uda maloomam mahsooraa

text: Indeed, your Lord extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]. Indeed He is ever, concerning His servants, Aware and Seeing.
tl: Inna Rabbaka yabsutur rizqa limaien yashaaa'u Wa-yaqdir; innahoo kaana bi'ibaadihee Khabeeran Baseera

text: And do not kill your children for fear of poverty. We provide for them and for you. Indeed, their killing is ever a great sin.
tl: Wa-laa taqtulooo awlaadakum khashyata imlaaqin nahnu narzuquhum Wa-iyyaakum; inna qatlahum kaana khit-'an kabeeraa

text: And do not approach unlawful sexual intercourse. Indeed, it is ever an immorality and is evil as a way.
tl: Wa-laa taqrabuz zinaaa innahoo kaana faahishatanw Wa-saaa'a sabeelaa

text: And do not kill the soul [i.e., person] which Allāh has forbidden, except by right. And whoever is killed unjustly - We have given his heir authority, but let him not exceed limits in [the matter of] taking life. Indeed, he has been supported [by the law].
tl: Wa-laa taqtulun nafsal latee harramal laahu illaa bilhaqq; Wa-man qutila mazlooman faqad ja'alnaa liwaliyyihee sultaanan falaa yusrif fil qatli innahoo kaana mansooraa

text: And do not approach the property of an orphan, except in the way that is best, until he reaches maturity. And fulfill [every] commitment. Indeed, the commitment is ever [that about which one will be] questioned.
tl: Wa-laa taqraboo maalal yateemi illaa billatee hiya ahsanu hattaa yablugha ashuddah; Wa-awfoo bil'ahd, innal 'ahda kaana mas'oolaa

text: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with an even [i.e., honest] balance. That is the best [way] and best in result.
tl: Wa-awful kaila izaa kiltum Wa-zinoo bilqistaasil mustaqeem; zaalika khairunw Wa-ahsanu ta'weelaa

text: And do not pursue that of which you have no knowledge. Indeed, the hearing, the sight and the heart - about all those [one] will be questioned.
tl: Wa-laa taqfu maa laisa laka bihee 'ilm; innas sam'a walbasara walfu'aada kullu ulaaa'ika kaana 'anhu mas'oolaa

text: And do not walk upon the earth exultantly. Indeed, you will never tear the earth [apart], and you will never reach the mountains in height.
tl: Wa-laa tamshi fil ardi marahan innaka lan takhriqal arda Wa-lan tablughal jibaala toola

text: All that [i.e., the aforementioned] - its evil is ever, in the sight of your Lord, detested.
tl: Kullu zaalika kaana sayyi'uhoo inda Rabbika makroohaa

text: That is from what your Lord has revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], of wisdom. And, [O mankind], do not make [as equal] with Allāh another deity, lest you be thrown into Hell, blamed and banished.
tl: Zaalika mimmaaa awhaaa ilaika Rabbuka minal hikmah; Wa-laa taj'al ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara fatulqaa fee Jahannama maloomammad hooraa

text: Then, has your Lord chosen you for [having] sons and taken [i.e., adopted] from among the angels daughters? Indeed, you say a grave saying.
tl: Afa-asfaakum rabbukum bilbaneena wattakhaza minal malaaa'ikati inaasaa; innakum lataqooloona qawlan 'azeema

text: And We have certainly diversified [the contents] in this Qur’ān that they [i.e., mankind] may be reminded, but it does not increase them [i.e., the disbelievers] except in aversion.
tl: Wa-laqad sarrafnaa fee haazal Quraani liyazzakkaroo Wa-maa yazeeduhum illaa nufooraa

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"If there had been with Him [other] gods, as they say, then they [each] would have sought to the Owner of the Throne a way.\"
tl: Qul law kaana ma'ahooo aalihatun kamaa yaqooloona izal labtaghaw ilaa zil 'Arshi Sabeela

text: Exalted is He and high above what they say by great sublimity.
tl: Subhaanahoo Wa-Ta'aalaa 'ammaa yaqooloona 'uluwwan kabeeraa

text: The seven heavens and the earth and whatever is in them exalt Him. And there is not a thing except that it exalts [Allāh] by His praise, but you do not understand their [way of] exalting. Indeed, He is ever Forbearing and Forgiving.
tl: Tusabbihu lahus samaawaatus sab'u wal-ardu Wa-man feehinn; Wa-im min shai'in illaa yusabbihu bihamdihee Wa-laakil laa tafqahoona tasbeehahum; innahoo kaana Haleeman Ghafooraa

text: And when you recite the Qur’ān, We put between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter a concealed partition.
tl: Wa-izaa qara'-tal Quraana ja'alnaa bainaka Wa-bainal lazeena laa yu'minoona bil-aakhirati hijaabam mastooraa

text: And We have placed over their hearts coverings, lest they understand it, and in their ears deafness. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Qur’ān, they turn back in aversion.
tl: Wa-ja'alnaa 'alaa quloo-bihim akinnatan any yafqahoohu Wa-feee aazaanihim waqraa; Wa-izaa zakarta Rabbaka fil Quraani wahdahoo wallaw 'alaaa adbaarihim nufooraa

text: We are most knowing of how they listen to it when they listen to you and [of] when they are in private conversation, when the wrongdoers say, \"You follow not but a man affected by magic.\"
tl: Nahnu a'lamu bimaa yastami'oona biheee iz yastami'oona ilaika Wa-iz hum najwaaa iz yaqooluz zaalimoona in tattabi'oona illaa rajulam mas-hooraa

text: Look how they strike for you comparisons; but they have strayed, so they cannot [find] a way.
tl: Unzur kaifa daraboo lakal amsaala fadalloo falaa yastatee'oona sabeelaa

text: And they say, \"When we are bones and crumbled particles, will we [truly] be resurrected as a new creation?\"
tl: Wa-qaalooo 'a-izaa kunnaa 'izaamanw Wa-rufaatan 'a-innaa lamab'oosoona khalqan jadeedaa

text: Say, \"Be you stones or iron
tl: Qul koonoo hijaaratan aw hadeedaa

text: Or [any] creation of that which is great within your breasts.\" And they will say, \"Who will restore us?\" Say, \"He who brought you forth the first time.\" Then they will nod their heads toward you and say, \"When is that?\" Say, \"Perhaps it will be soon -
tl: Aw khalqam mimmaa yakburu fee sudoorikum; fasa-yaqooloona maien yu'eedunaa qulil lazee fatarakum awwala marrah; fasa yunghidoona ilaika ru'oosahum Wa-yaqooloona mataahoo; qul 'asaaa any yakoona qareeba

text: On the Day He will call you and you will respond with praise of Him and think that you had not remained [in the world] except for a little.\"
tl: Yawma yad'ookum fatastajeeboona bihamdihee Wa-tazunnoona il labistum illaa qaleela

text: And tell My servants to say that which is best. Indeed, Satan induces [dissension] among them. Indeed Satan is ever, to mankind, a clear enemy.
tl: Wa-qul li'ibaadee yaqoolul latee hiya ahsan; innash shaitaana yanzaghu bainahum; innash shaitaana kaana lil-insaani 'aduwwam mubeenaa

text: Your Lord is most knowing of you. If He wills, He will have mercy upon you; or if He wills, He will punish you. And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], over them as a manager.
tl: Rabbukum a'lamu bikum iny yasha' yarhamkum aw iny yasha' yu'azzibkum; Wa-maaa arsalnaaka 'alaihim wakeelaa

text: And your Lord is most knowing of whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And We have made some of the prophets exceed others [in various ways], and to David We gave the book [of Psalms].
tl: Wa-Rabbuka a'lamu biman fis samaawaati wal-ard; Wa-laqad faddalnaa ba'dan Nabiyyeena 'alaa ba'dinw Wa-aatainaaa Daawooda Zabooraa

text: Say, \"Invoke those you have claimed [as gods] besides Him, for they do not possess the [ability for] removal of adversity from you or [for its] transfer [to someone else].\"
tl: Qulid 'ul lazeena za'amtum min doonihee falaa yamlikoona kashfad durri 'ankum Wa-laa tahweelaa

text: Those whom they invoke seek means of access to their Lord, [striving as to] which of them would be nearest, and they hope for His mercy and fear His punishment. Indeed, the punishment of your Lord is ever feared.
tl: Ulaaa'ikal lazeena yad'oona yabtaghoona ilaa Rabbihimul waseelata ayyuhum aqrabu Wa-yarjoona rahmatahoo Wa-yakhaafoona 'azaabah; inna 'azaaba rabbika kaana mahzooraa

text: And there is no city but that We will destroy it before the Day of Resurrection or punish it with a severe punishment. That has ever been in the Register inscribed.
tl: Wa-in min qaryatin illaa Nahnu muhlikoohaa qabla Yawmil Qiyaamati aw mu'az-ziboohaa 'azaaban shadeedaa; kaana zaalika fil Kitaabi mastooraa

text: And nothing has prevented Us from sending signs [i.e., miracles] except that the former peoples denied them. And We gave Thamūd the she-camel as a visible sign, but they wronged her. And We send not the signs except as a warning.
tl: Wa-maa mana'anaaa an nursila bil-aayaati illaaa an kazzaba bihal awwaloon; Wa-aatainaa Samoodan naaqata mubsiratan fazalamoo bihaa; Wa-maa nursilu bil-aayaati illaa takhweefaa

text: And [remember, O Muḥammad], when We told you, \"Indeed, your Lord has encompassed the people.\" And We did not make the sight which We showed you except as a trial for the people, as was the accursed tree [mentioned] in the Qur’ān. And We threaten [i.e., warn] them, but it increases them not except in great transgression.
tl: Wa-iz qulnaa laka inna rabbaka ahaata binnaas; Wa-maa ja'alnar ru'yal lateee arainaaka illaa fitnatal linnaasi washshajaratal mal'oonata fil quraan; Wa-nukhaw-wifuhum famaa yazeeduhum illa tughyaanan kabeeraa

text: And [mention] when We said to the angels, \"Prostrate to Adam,\" and they prostrated, except for Iblees. He said, \"Should I prostrate to one You created from clay?\"
tl: Wa-iz qulnaa lilma-laaa'ikatis judoo li-Aadama fasajadooo illaaa Ibleesa qaala 'a-asjudu liman khalaqta teena

text: [Iblees] said, \"Do You see this one whom You have honored above me? If You delay me [i.e., my death] until the Day of Resurrection, I will surely destroy his descendants, except for a few.\"
tl: Qaala ara'aytaka haazal lazee karramta 'alaiya la'in akhartani ilaa Yawmil Qiyaamati la-ahtanikanna zurriyyatahooo illaa qaleelaa

text: [Allāh] said, \"Go, for whoever of them follows you, indeed Hell will be the recompense of [all of] you - an ample recompense.
tl: Qaalaz hab faman tabi'aka minhum fa-inna Jahannama jazaaa'ukum jazaaa'am mawfooraa

text: And incite [to senselessness] whoever you can among them with your voice and assault them with your horses and foot soldiers and become a partner in their wealth and their children and promise them.\" But Satan does not promise them except delusion.
tl: Wastafziz manis tata'ta minhum bisawtika Wa-ajlib 'alaihim bikhailika Wa-rajilika Wa-shaarik-hum fil amwaali wal-awlaadi Wa-'idhum; Wa-maa ya'iduhumush Shaitaanu illaa ghurooraa

text: Indeed, over My [believing] servants there is for you no authority. And sufficient is your Lord as Disposer of affairs.
tl: Inna 'ibaadee laisa laka 'alaihim sultaan; Wa-kafaa bi-Rabbika Wakeelaa

text: It is your Lord who drives the ship for you through the sea that you may seek of His bounty. Indeed, He is ever, to you, Merciful.
tl: Rabbukumul lazee yuzjee lakumul fulka fil bahri litabtaghoo min fadlih; innahoo kaana bikum Raheemaa

text: And when adversity touches you at sea, lost are [all] those you invoke except for Him. But when He delivers you to the land, you turn away [from Him]. And ever is man ungrateful.
tl: Wa-izaa massakumud durru fil bahri dalla man tad'oona illaaa iyyaahu falammaa najjaakum ilal barri a'radtum; Wa-kaanal insaanu kafooraa

text: Then do you feel secure that [instead] He will not cause a part of the land to swallow you or send against you a storm of stones? Then you would not find for yourselves an advocate.
tl: Afa-amintum aien yakhsifa bikum jaanibal barri aw yursila 'alaikum haasiban summa laa tajidoo lakum wakeelaa

text: Or do you feel secure that He will not send you back into it [i.e., the sea] another time and send upon you a hurricane of wind and drown you for what you denied? Then you would not find for yourselves against Us an avenger.
tl: Am amintum aien yu'eedakum feehi taaratan ukhraa fa-yursila 'alaikum qaasifam minar reehi fa-yugh-riqakum bimaa kafartum summa laa tajidoo lakum 'alainaa bihee tabee'aa

text: And We have certainly honored the children of Adam and carried them on the land and sea and provided for them of the good things and preferred them over much of what We have created, with [definite] preference.
tl: Wa-laqad karramnaa Baneee aadama Wa-hamalnaahum fil barri walbahri Wa-razaqnaahum minat taiyibaati Wa-faddalnaahum 'alaa kaseerim mimman khalaqnaa tafdeelaa

text: [Mention, O Muḥammad], the Day We will call forth every people with their record [of deeds]. Then whoever is given his record in his right hand - those will read their records, and injustice will not be done to them, [even] as much as a thread [inside the date seed].
tl: Yawma nad'oo kulla unaasim bi-imaamihim faman ootiya kitaabahoo bi-yameenihee fa-ulaaa'ika yaqra'oona kitaabahum Wa-laa yuzlamoona fateelaa

text: And whoever is blind in this [life] will be blind in the Hereafter and more astray in way.
tl: Wa-man kaana fee haaziheee a'maa fahuwa fil aakhirati a'maa Wa-adallu sabeelaa

text: And indeed, they were about to tempt you away from that which We revealed to you in order to [make] you invent about Us something else; and then they would have taken you as a friend.
tl: Wa-in kaadoo la-yaftinoonaka 'anil lazeee awhainaaa ilaika litaftariya 'alainaaa ghairahoo Wa-izallat takhazooka khaleelaa

text: And if We had not strengthened you, you would have almost inclined to them a little.
tl: Wa-law-laaa an sabbatnaaka laqad kitta tarkanu ilaihim shai'an qaleela

text: Then [if you had], We would have made you taste double [punishment in] life and double [after] death. Then you would not find for yourself against Us a helper.
tl: Izal la-azaqnaaka di'fal hayaati Wa-di'fal mamaati summa laa tajidu laka 'alainaa naseeraa

text: And indeed, they were about to provoke [i.e., drive] you from the land [i.e., Makkah] to evict you therefrom. And then [when they do], they will not remain [there] after you, except for a little.
tl: Wa-in kaadoo la-yastafizzoonaka minal ardi liyukhri-jooka minhaa Wa-izal laa yalbasoona khilaafaka illaa qaleelaa

text: [That is Our] established way for those We had sent before you of Our messengers; and you will not find in Our way any alteration.
tl: Sunnata man qad arsalnaa qablaka mir Rusulinaa Wa-laa tajidu lisunnatinaa tahweelaa

text: Establish prayer at the decline of the sun [from its meridian] until the darkness of the night and [also] the Qur’ān [i.e., recitation] of dawn. Indeed, the recitation of dawn is ever witnessed.
tl: Aqimis Salaata liduloo-kish shamsi ilaa ghasaqil laili Wa-quraanal Fajri inna quraa-nal Fajri kaana mashhoodaa

text: And from [part of] the night, pray with it [i.e., recitation of the Qur’ān] as additional [worship] for you; it is expected that your Lord will resurrect you to a praised station.
tl: Wa-minal laili fatahajjad bihee naafilatal laka 'asaaa any yab'asaka Rabbuka Maqaamam Mahmoodaa

text: And say, \"My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and to exit a sound exit and grant me from Yourself a supporting authority.\"
tl: Wa-qur Rabbi adkhilnee mudkhala sidqinw Wa-akhrijnee mukhraja sidqinw waj'al lee mil ladunka sultaanan naseeraa

text: And say, \"Truth has come, and falsehood has departed. Indeed is falsehood, [by nature], ever bound to depart.\"
tl: Wa-qul jaaa'al haqqu Wa-zahaqal baatil; innal baatila kaana zahooqaa

text: And We send down of the Qur’ān that which is healing and mercy for the believers, but it does not increase the wrongdoers except in loss.
tl: Wa-nunazzilu minal quraani maa huwa shifaaa'unw Wa-rahmatullil mu'mineena Wa-laa yazeeduz zaalimeena illaa khasaaraa

text: And when We bestow favor upon man [i.e., the disbeliever], he turns away and distances himself; and when evil touches him, he is ever despairing.
tl: Wa-izaaa an'amnaa 'alal insaani a'rada Wa-na-aa bijaani-bihee Wa-izaa massahush sharru kaana ya'oosaa

text: Say, \"Each works according to his manner, but your Lord is most knowing of who is best guided in way.\"
tl: Qul kulluny ya'malu 'alaa shaakilatihee fa-rabbukum a'lamu biman huwa ahdaa sabeelaa

text: And they ask you, [O Muḥammad], about the soul. Say, \"The soul is of the affair [i.e., concern] of my Lord. And you [i.e., mankind] have not been given of knowledge except a little.\"
tl: Wa-yas'aloonaka 'anir rooh; qulir roohu min amri rabbee Wa-maaa ooteetum minal 'ilmi illaa qaleelaa

text: And if We willed, We could surely do away with that which We revealed to you. Then you would not find for yourself concerning it an advocate against Us.
tl: Wa-la'in shi'naa lanaz-habanna billazeee awhainaaa ilaika summa laa tajidu laka bihee 'alainaa wakeelaa

text: Except [We have left it with you] as a mercy from your Lord. Indeed, His favor upon you has ever been great.
tl: Illaa rahmatam mir Rabbik; inna fadlahoo kaana 'alaika kabeeraa

text: Say, \"If mankind and the jinn gathered in order to produce the like of this Qur’ān, they could not produce the like of it, even if they were to each other assistants.\"
tl: Qul la'inij tama'atil insu waljinnu 'alaaa aien ya'too bimisli haazal quraani laa ya'toona bimislihee Wa-law kaana ba'duhum liba-'din zaheeraa

text: And We have certainly diversified for the people in this Qur’ān from every [kind of] example, but most of the people refused except disbelief.
tl: Wa-laqad sarrafnaa linnaasi fee haazal quraani min kulli masalin fa-abaaa aksarun naasi illaa kufooraa

text: And they say, \"We will not believe you until you break open for us from the ground a spring
tl: Wa-qaaloo lan nu'mina laka hattaa tafjura lanaa minal ardi yamboo'aa

text: Or [until] you have a garden of palm trees and grapes and make rivers gush forth within them in force [and abundance]
tl: Aw takoona laka jannatum min nakheelinw Wa-'inabin fatufajjiral anhaara khilaalahaa tafjeeraa

text: Or you make the heaven fall upon us in fragments as you have claimed or you bring Allāh and the angels before [us]
tl: Aw tusqitas samaaa'a kamaa za'amta 'alainaa kisafan aw ta'tiya billaahi wal-malaaa'ikati qabeelaa

text: Or you have a house of ornament [i.e., gold] or you ascend into the sky. And [even then], we will not believe in your ascension until you bring down to us a book we may read.\" Say, \"Exalted is my Lord! Was I ever but a human messenger?\"
tl: Aw yakoona laka baitum min zukhrufin aw tarqaa fis samaaa'i Wa-lan nu'mina liruqiyyika hatta tunazzila 'alainaa kitaaban naqra'uh; qul Subhaana Rabbee hal kuntu illaa basharar Rasoolaa

text: And what prevented the people from believing when guidance came to them except that they said, \"Has Allāh sent a human messenger?\"
tl: Wa-maa mana'an naasa any yu'minooo iz jaaa'ahumul hudaaa illaaa an qaalooo aba'asal laahu basharar Rasoolaa

text: Say, \"If there were upon the earth angels walking securely, We would have sent down to them from the heaven an angel [as a] messenger.\"
tl: Qul law kaana fil ardi malaaa-'ikatuien yamshoona mutma'in-neena lanazzalnaa 'alaihim minas samaaa'i malakar Rasoolaa

text: Say, \"Sufficient is Allāh as Witness between me and you. Indeed He is ever, concerning His servants, Aware and Seeing.\"
tl: Qul kafaa billaahi shaheedam bainee Wa-bainakum; innahoo kaana bi'ibaadihee Khabeeram Baseeraa

text: And whoever Allāh guides - he is the [rightly] guided; and whoever He sends astray - you will never find for them protectors besides Him, and We will gather them on the Day of Resurrection [fallen] on their faces - blind, dumb and deaf. Their refuge is Hell; every time it subsides, We increase [for] them blazing fire.
tl: Wa-maien yahdil laahu fahuwal muhtad; Wa-mai yudlil falan tajida lahum awliyaaa'a min doonih; Wa-nahshuruhum Yawmal Qiyaamati 'alaa wujoohihim umyanw Wa-bukmanw Wa-summaa; ma'waahum Jahannamu kullamaa khabat zidnaahum sa'eeraa

text: That is their recompense because they disbelieved in Our verses and said, \"When we are bones and crumbled particles, will we [truly] be resurrected [in] a new creation?\"
tl: Zaalika jazaa'uhum bi-annahum kafaroo bi-aayaatinaa Wa-qaalooo 'a-izaa kunnaa 'izaamanw Wa-rufaatan 'a-innaa la-mab'oosoona khalqan jadeedaa

text: Do they not see that Allāh, who created the heavens and earth, is [the one] Able to create the likes of them? And He has appointed for them a term, about which there is no doubt. But the wrongdoers refuse except disbelief.
tl: Awalam yaraw annal laahal lazee khalaqas samaawaati wal-arda qaadirun 'alaaa aien yakhluqa mislahum Wa-ja'ala lahum ajalal laa raiba fee; fa-abaz zaalimoona illaa kufooraa

text: Say [to them], \"If you possessed the depositories of the mercy of my Lord, then you would withhold out of fear of spending.\" And ever has man been stingy.
tl: Qul law antum tamlikoona khazaaa'ina rahmati Rabbeee izal la-amsaktum khash-yatal infaaq; Wa-kaanal insaanu qatooraa

text: And We had certainly given Moses nine evident signs, so ask the Children of Israel [about] when he came to them and Pharaoh said to him, \"Indeed I think, O Moses, that you are affected by magic.\"
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Moosaa tis'a Aayaatim baiyyinaatin fas'al Baneee Israaa'eela iz jaaa'ahum faqaala lahoo Fir'awnu inee la-azunnuka yaa-Moosaa mas-hooraa

text: [Moses] said, \"You have already known that none has sent down these [signs] except the Lord of the heavens and the earth as evidence, and indeed I think, O Pharaoh, that you are destroyed.\"
tl: Qaala laqad 'alimta maaa anzala haaa'ulaaa'i illaa Rabbus samaawaati wal-ardi basaaa'ira Wa-innee la-azun-nuka yaa-Fir'awnu masbooraa

text: So he intended to drive them from the land, but We drowned him and those with him all together.
tl: Fa-araada aien yastafizzahum minal ardi fa-aghraqnaahu Wa-mam ma'ahoo jamee'aa

text: And We said after him [i.e., Pharaoh] to the Children of Israel, \"Dwell in the land, and when there comes the promise [i.e., appointment] of the Hereafter, We will bring you forth in [one] gathering.\"
tl: Wa-qulnaa min ba'dihee li-Baneee Israaa'eelas kunul arda fa-izaa jaaa'a wa'dul aakhirati ji'naa bikum lafeefaa

text: And with the truth We have sent it [i.e., the Qur’ān] down, and with the truth it has descended. And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner.
tl: Wa-bilhaqqi anzalnaahu Wa-bilhaqqi nazal; Wa-maaa arsalnaaka illaa mubash-shiranw Wa-nazeeraa

text: And [it is] a Qur’ān which We have separated [by intervals] that you might recite it to the people over a prolonged period. And We have sent it down progressively.
tl: Wa-quraanan faraqnaahu litaqra-ahoo 'alan naasi 'alaa muksinw Wa-nazzalnaahu tanzeelaa

text: Say, \"Believe in it or do not believe.\" Indeed, those who were given knowledge before it - when it is recited to them, they fall upon their faces in prostration,
tl: Qul aaminoo biheee aw laa tu'minoo; innal lazeena ootul 'ilma min qabliheee izaa yutlaa 'alaihim yakhirroona lil-azqaani sujjadaa

text: And they say, \"Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, the promise of our Lord has been fulfilled.\"
tl: Wa-yaqooloona Subhaana Rabbinaaa in kaana wa'du Rabbinaa lamaf'oolaa

text: And they fall upon their faces weeping, and it [i.e., the Qur’ān] increases them in humble submission.
tl: Wa-yakhirroona lil-azqaani yabkoona Wa-yazeeduhum khushoo'aa

text: Say, \"Call upon Allāh or call upon the Most Merciful [ar-Raḥmān]. Whichever [name] you call - to Him belong the best names.\" And do not recite [too] loudly in your prayer or [too] quietly but seek between that an [intermediate] way.
tl: Qulid 'ul laaha awid 'ur Rahmaana ayyam maa tad'oo falahul asmaaa'ul Husnaa; Wa-laa tajhar bi-Salaatika Wa-laa tukhaafit bihaa wabtaghi baina zaalika sabeela

text: And say, \"Praise to Allāh, who has not taken a son and has had no partner in [His] dominion and has no [need of a] protector out of weakness; and glorify Him with [great] glorification.\"
tl: Wa-qulil hamdu lillaahil lazee lam yattakhiz waladanw Wa-lam yakul lahoo shareekun fil mulki Wa-lam yakul lahoo waliyyum minaz zulli Wa-kabbirhu takbeeraa
